releaseNotes:
• TV: in the Movies and Series grids, pausing on a title for about 3 seconds now plays a muted preview in the corner. Off by default — turn on "Preview on dwell in browse" in Settings (best on boxes with memory to spare).
• Multi-view: when debug logging is on, each cell now shows a small playback-stats readout (resolution, frame rate, dropped frames) sized to fit.
